channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utes ready to rock the Regionals
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah gymnastics team is the only program in the nation that has qualified for all 48 NCAA National Championship gymnastics meets.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Heat extend winning streak to 6 games and snap Celtics' 9-game streak with 124-103 victory
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro had 25 points and nine assists and the Miami Heat extended their season-best winning streak to six games with a 124-103 victory over the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: SafeSport knew of allegations against former cop before hiring him as investigator
item.description: People at the U.S. Center for SafeSport knew a former police officer was the subject of an internal investigation at his former job but hired him anyway, according to details released Wednesday by Sen. Chuck Grassley, who is looking into the matter.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin scores his 892nd career goal. He needs 2 to tie Gretzky and 3 to break the NHL record
item.description: Alex Ovechkin moved three goals away from breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record with No. 892 in the Washington Capitals’ game at the Carolina Hurricanes on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: All 5 starters out for exhausted Nuggets against Spurs following double-0T heartbreaker
item.description: All five of the Denver Nuggets starters are out for their game against the San Antonio Spurs on Wednedsay night.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NBA investigating Grizzles' Ja Morant, Warriors' Buddy Hield for gun-related gestures on court: report
item.description: Ja Morant has yet another gun-related investigation going on, as the league is reportedly looking into a gesture he and Warriors' Buddy Hield made on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Lauren Betts and UCLA reach first Final Four of women's NCAA Tournament, beating LSU 72-65
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Lauren Betts had 17 points and seven rebounds despite spending the entire second quarter on the bench, and top overall seed UCLA reached its first Final Four of the women's NCAA Tournament with a 72-65 victory over LSU on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CMU men's lacrosse escapes Concorida as Maverick women dominate CSU Pueblo
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa's Men's Lacrosse team looked in full control on their way to a sixth win when they held a 7-3 second-half lead over RMAC foe Concordia University Irvine. Then came a Golden Eagle onslaught. Three quick goals and CUI was within one.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: DePaul women's basketball coach Doug Bruno steps down after 39 seasons
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago has produced a lot of basketball icons and one of them in Lincoln Park is stepping down — DePaul's longtime women's basketball coach Doug Bruno.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Royal Riot Podcast Exclusive: Ariath Piol talks goals, red cards, and his journey to RSL
item.description: Royal Riot Podcast hosts Hayden and Mattey sit down with Ariath Piol in an exclusive interview where the player opens up about his journey to RSL, the emotions, lessons, and support he has received from the club and more.
item.dc:creator: Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Loyola Chicago men's basketball team beats Kent State, advances to NIT semifinals
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Loyola Chicago men's basketball team didn't make the 68-team NCAA Tournament field this season, but the Ramblers are still ramblin' on to a different Final Four.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
